sections.paragraph:
μυλωνικός, ή, όν (μυλών) belonging to the mill-house μ. λίθος millstone Mk 9:42 v.l., prob. a correction arising from a misread μύλο(ς) ὀνικός (μ. as subst. is found Mitt-Wilck. I/2, 323, 7 [II a.d.]; BGU 1900, 1; 12 al.).—DELG s.v. μύλη A6.

prob. prob. = probable, probably

subst. subst. = substantive(ly)

Mitt-Wilck. Mitt-Wilck. = LMitteis/UWilcken, Grundzüge und Chrestomathie der Papyruskunde—Lists 4, 6

BGU BGU = Aegyptische Urkunden aus den Museen zu Berlin: Griechische Urkunden—List 4

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 661
